title: T-Mobile CEO Looks Beyond Starlink for Cellular Satellite Service
summary: It’s going to be table stakes as a complementary service to have satellite along with your cellular service,” T-Mobile CEO Srini Gopalan said during a Thursday earnings call when asked about plans for T-Satellite.
